Training

Training

Swim. Bike. Run.

Use this page to explain the training structure and link members to the live calendar.

Open Training Calendar Ask a Question

Sessions

What training includes.

Swim

Swimming

Pool sessions for a range of abilities.

Bike

Cycling

Social and structured rides around Sheffield and towards the Peaks.

Run

Running

Group runs and structured efforts for different paces.

Calendar

Live training calendar.

Replace the button URL with the club Google Calendar link or embed code.

Embed not configured yet.

FAQ

Training questions.

Can beginners attend training?

Yes. The club is built to welcome a range of abilities.

Where is the live timetable?

Use the training calendar link once committee has added the current calendar.

What should I bring?

Bring the kit needed for the session and ask committee if unsure.

Sheffield Triathlon Swim. Bike. Run. Belong.

Swim, bike and run with Sheffield Triathlon. Training, racing and socials for complete beginners and experienced athletes.

A student-led University of Sheffield triathlon club connected to Sport Sheffield.
